en: Zhang Peng: Look! That’s the tallest dinosaur in this hall.
zh: 张鹏：快看！那只恐龙在这一间教室里最高的。

en: Mike: Yes, it is. How tall is it?
zh: 迈克：是的，它是。它有多高？

en: Zhang Peng: Maybe 4 metres.
zh: 张鹏：大概四米。

en: Mike: Wow! It’s taller than both of us together.
zh: 迈克：哇！它比我们两个人加起来还要高。

en: Zhang Peng: Look! There are more dinosaurs over there!
zh: 张鹏：快看！那边还有更多的恐龙！

en: Mike: They’re all so big and tall.
zh: 迈克：它们都很大很 tall。

en: Zhang Peng: Hey, this dinosaur isn’t tall! I’m taller than this one.
zh: 张鹏：嘿，这只恐龙不高！我比这只恐龙高。

en: Mike: Oh, yes. How tall are you?
zh: 迈克：哦，是的。你有多高？

en: Zhang Peng: I’m 1.65 metres.
zh: 张鹏：我1.65米。

en: How tall is Zhang Peng?
zh: 张鹏有多高？

en: Who is taller, Zhang Peng or the small dinosaur?
zh: 张鹏还是小恐龙哪个更高？

en: How tall are you? I’m                     metres.
zh: 你有多高？我                     米。

en: Who is taller than you?                                               .
zh: 比你高的人是谁？                                               。

en: How old are you? I’m                     .
zh: 你多大？我                     。

en: Who is older than you?                                                .
zh: 比你大的人是谁？                                                。

en: Mike: Those shoes in the window are nice! Let’s have a look.
zh: 迈克：窗户里的鞋子真漂亮！我们去看看吧。

en: Wu Binbin: What size are your shoes, Mike?
zh: 吴彬彬：你的鞋子是什么码，迈克？

en: Mike: Size 7.
zh: 迈克：7码。

en: Wu Binbin: Size 7? That’s so small.
zh: 吴彬彬：7码？真小。

en: Mike: In China I wear size 40 shoes.
zh: 迈克：在中国我穿40码的鞋。

en: Wu Binbin: Oh! Your feet are bigger than mine. My shoes are size 37.
zh: 吴彬彬：哦！你的脚比我的大。我的鞋是37码。

en: Mike: Really? You look taller than me.
zh: 迈克：真的吗？你看起来比我高。

en: Wu Binbin: But I think you are heavier.
zh: 吴彬彬：但是我觉得你更重。

en: How heavy are you?
zh: 你有多重？

en: Mike: I’m 48 kilograms.
zh: 迈克：我48公斤。

en: Wu Binbin: Yes, you’re heavier. I’m 46 kilograms.
zh: 吴彬彬：是的，你更重。我46公斤。

en: What size are Wu Binbin’s shoes?
zh: 吴彬彬穿什么码的鞋？

en: How heavy is Wu Binbin?
zh: 吴彬彬有多重？

en: Who is heavier than you?                             .
zh: 比你重的人是谁？                             。

en: What size are your shoes?
zh: 你穿什么码的鞋？

en: Whose shoes are bigger?                              .
zh: 谁穿的鞋更大？                              。

en: thinner   heavier
zh: 更薄  更重

en: Spring is coming! The sky is clearer and the sun is brighter. Can you think of any other changes? Look and tick.
zh: 春天来了！天空更清晰，太阳更亮。你能想出其他的变化吗？ 看看并勾选。

en: Wu Binbin and his family are going on a trip to the countryside. Wu Binbin has a story to tell Robin.
zh: 吴彬彬和他的家人要去乡下旅行。吴彬彬有一个故事要告诉罗宾。

en: Old Tree says,
zh: 老树说，

en: "That’s easy, Little Duck. The sun goes down every day, and we grow older every day. Your shadow grows longer because you are growing taller. You are becoming a big beautiful bird!"
zh: “这很容易，小鸭子。太阳每天都落下，我们每天都变老。你的影子变长是因为你一天一天长大。你正变成了一只美丽的鸟！”

en: Why is that?
zh: 为什么这样？

en: Little Duck asks his friend Old Tree. "You are older an"
zh: 小鸭子问他的朋友老树：“你变老了。”

en: Can you answer Little Duck’s question, Robin?
zh: 你能回答小鸭子的问题吗，罗宾？

en: Choose a title for the story.
zh: 选择故事的标题。

en: Little Duck: Old Tree, the sun gets _______, but my shadow gets _______. Why?
zh: 小鸭子说：老树，太阳变低了，但我的影子变长了。为什么？

en: Old Tree: That’s easy. Your shadow gets longer because you are getting _______ and growing _______ every day.
zh: 老树说：那很简单。你的影子变长是因为你一天天长大，变得_______和_______。

en: Little Duck: So what will happen to me?
zh: 小鸭子说：那对我来说会发生什么？

en: Old Tree: Well, …
zh: 老树说：嗯…

en: Zebra: They need a new goalkeeper.
zh: 斑马说：他们需要一个新守门员。

en: Deer: I’d like to have a try.
zh: 鹿说：我想试试。

en: Giraffe: Me too.
zh: 长颈鹿说：我也想。

en: Zoom: How tall are you?
zh: 迅猛龙说：你有多高？

en: Deer: I’m 1.8 metres.
zh: 鹿说：我1.8米高。

en: Zip: How heavy are you?
zh: 小马说：你有多重？

en: Deer: I’m 86 kilograms.
zh: 鹿说：我86公斤重。

en: Dog: I can’t wait.
zh: 狗说：我迫不及待了。

en: Zip: Mr Zebra is 10 centimetres taller than Mr Deer.
zh: 小马说：斑马先生比鹿先生高10厘米。

en: Giraffe: I’m the tallest one.
zh: 长颈鹿说：我最高的。

en: Zip: Sorry. Your neck is too long. The others can’t reach you.
zh: 小马说：对不起。你的脖子太长了。其他人够不着你。

en: Zoom: Yes, and he’s stronger.
zh: 迅猛龙说：是的，而且他更强壮。

en: But he can’t catch the ball!
zh: 但是他没能抓住球！

en: Football needs teamwork.
zh: 足球需要团队合作。

en: Hippo: What’s happening here?
zh: 河马说：这里发生了什么？

en: Oh! Here’s the one we want!
zh: 哦！这就是我们想要的东西！

en: Why? He’s too heavy!
zh: 为什么？他太重了！

en: We need a big guy!
zh: 我们需要一个大个子！

en: Hi, Grandpa. How are you? How was your weekend?
zh: 你好，爷爷。你怎么样？你周末过得怎么样？

en: I’m fine, Mike. It was good, thank you.
zh: 我很好，Mike。谢谢你，我周末过得不错。

en: What did you do?
zh: 你做了什么？

en: Well, I stayed at home with your grandma. We drank tea in the afternoon and watched TV.
zh: 我跟奶奶在家休息，下午喝茶看电视。

en: I watched TV, too.
zh: 我也看电视了。

en: I watched some children’s shows on TV.
zh: 我看了很多儿童节目。

en: That’s nice. Did you do anything else?
zh: 真好。你还做了什么别的？

en: Yes, I cleaned my room and washed my clothes.
zh: 是的，我打扫了我的房间，洗了我的衣服。

en: You are a good boy!
zh: 你真棒！

en: What did Mike’s grandpa do last weekend?
zh: Mike的爷爷上周末做了什么？

en: How was your weekend?
zh: 你周末过得怎么样？

en: What did you do last weekend?
zh: 你上周末做了什么？

en: What are you going to do next weekend?
zh: 你下个周末打算做什么？

en: Hey, Amy. Let’s go to the bookstore. I want to buy the new film magazine.
zh: Amy，我们去书店吧。我想买最新的电影杂志。

en: Oh, I read it last weekend.
zh: 哦，我上周末读了它。

en: Was it interesting?
zh: 它很有趣吗？

en: Yes, it talked about a lot of new films.
zh: 是的，它介绍了很多新电影。

en: What did you do last weekend? Did you see a film?
zh: 你上周末做了什么？你看了电影吗？

en: No, I had a cold. I stayed at home all weekend and slept.
zh: 不，我感冒了。我整个周末都在家睡觉。

en: Oh, I’m sorry. I’m happy you feel better now.
zh: 哦，我很抱歉。很高兴你现在感觉好多了。

en: Thanks. Let’s go by bus. It’s faster than walking.
zh: 谢谢。我们坐公交车去吧。比走路快。

en: Did John see a film last weekend? What did he do?
zh: John上周末看了电影吗？他做了什么？

en: What did you do yesterday/last night …?
zh: 你昨天/上个晚上做了什么…？

en: What do you usually do on weekends?
zh: 你周末通常做什么？

en: This is Mrs Broom. She works in a hotel.
zh: 这是布鲁姆夫人。她住在酒店工作。

en: She is a housekeeper.
zh: 她是酒店的管家。

en: What do you think she did yesterday?
zh: 你觉得她昨天做了什么？

en: made the beds
zh: 整理了床铺

en: cooked the food
zh: 做饭了

en: cleaned the rooms
zh: 打扫了房间

en: Wu Binbin and his family stayed at the Holiday Hotel.
zh: 吴斌斌和他的家人住在假日酒店。

en: It was not a happy time.
zh: 那段时间并不愉快。

en:
Dear Sir,
Our weekend at your hotel was bad. Our room was big but everything was very old.
zh:
尊敬的先生,
我们住你们的酒店的周末不愉快。我们的房间很大，但是东西都很旧。

en: Our friend Robin cleaned our room and fixed a broken chair.
zh: 我们的朋友罗宾打扫了我们的房间，修理了一把坏椅子。

en: My mother wanted to read a book but the lamp was too small.
zh: 我妈妈想看书，但是台灯太小了。

en: My dad got some hamburgers from the hotel kitchen, but they were cold and tasted bad.
zh: 我爸爸从酒店厨房买了一些汉堡，但是它们是冷的，味道不好。

en: I wanted to watch TV but the TV didn’t work. The people in Room 301 listened to loud music. I didn’t sleep all night.
zh: 我想要看电视，但是电视坏了。房间301的人们放着很大的音乐。我一夜都没睡。

en: I’m sorry, but we didn’t enjoy our stay very much.
zh: 我很抱歉，我们住得很不愉快。

en: Wu Binbin and family
zh: 吴斌斌和家人

en: Now write about your bad but good day.
zh: 请写下你糟糕但又好的一天。

en: Today was a bad but good day for me.
zh: 今天对我来说是糟糕但又好的一天。

en: First, it was a bad day.
zh: 首先，那一天是糟糕的。

en: But what did I do then?
zh: 但是那天我做了什么？

en: So it was also a good day.
zh: 所以那一天也很好。

en: As the saying goes, "Bad luck often brings good luck."
zh: 正如谚语所说：“坏运往往带来好运。”

en: Listen and write T (true) or F (false).
zh: 听写，写出 T (正确) 或 F (错误)。

en: Listen again and answer the questions.
zh: 再次听录音并回答问题。

en: What did Mike do last weekend?
zh: 迈克上周末做了什么？

en: Why did Sarah think her weekend was great?
zh: 莎拉觉得她的周末很棒的原因是什么？

en: Why did Amy go to school by car today?
zh: 艾米今天为什么开车去学校？

en: What did Zhang Peng do in Harbin?
zh: 张鹏在哈尔滨做了什么？

en: Let’s wrap it up
zh: 让我们收尾一下

en: Look at the pictures. Choose words to ﬁll in the blanks.
zh: 观察图片，选择单词填空。

en: There          lots of dinosaurs many years ago.
zh: 有……很多恐龙在很久以前。

en: Some of them           plants.
zh: 一些它们……植物。

en: Some of them ______ faster, so they could eat other smaller dinosaurs.
zh: 一些它们跑得更快，所以它们可以吃其他更小的恐龙。

en: But we can only see dinosaurs in museums now.
zh: 但是现在我们只能在博物馆里看到恐龙了。

en: Zoom: Am I now on the moon? I can’t believe it!
zh: 朱姆：我现在在月球吗？我不敢相信！

en: She must be Chang’e.
zh: 她一定是嫦娥。

en: Oh, there is the rabbit.
zh: 哦，那里有兔子。

en: Zip: Where did you go?
zh: 齐普：你去了哪里？

en: Zoom: I went to the moon.
zh: 朱姆：我去了月球。

en: Zip: How was your holiday?
zh: 齐普：你的假期怎么样？

en: Zoom: It was fun.
zh: 朱姆：很有趣。

en: Zoom: By spaceship.
zh: 朱姆：坐飞船。

en: Zip: What did you see?
zh: 齐普：你看到了什么？

en: Zoom: I saw Chang’e, the rabbit and the tree.
zh: 朱姆：我看到了嫦娥、兔子和树。

en: Zip: Did you take any pictures?
zh: 齐普：你拍了照片吗？

en: Zoom: Yes, I did. Oops, where did I put the pictures?
zh: 朱姆：是的，我拍了。哦，我把照片放在哪里了？

en: Zoom: Oh, it was a dream.
zh: 朱姆：哦，那真是一场梦。

en: Today, there is a guest visiting the school.
zh: 今天有客人来学校了。

en: The school changed a little.
zh: 学校变了一点。

en: Grandpa: Wow, a library! There was no library in my old school.
zh: 爷爷：哇，有一座图书馆！我以前的学校没有图书馆。

en: Sarah: Tell us about your school, please.
zh: 莎拉：请你告诉我你的学校怎么样。

en: Grandpa: There was only one small building on a hill.
zh: 爷爷：只有一栋小楼在山上。

en: Wu Binbin: Could you see stars at night?
zh: 吴彬彬：你晚上能看到星星吗？

en: Grandpa: Yes, I liked the stars.
zh: 爷爷：是的，我喜欢星星。

en: Sarah: Me too. One day I’m going to visit the moon.
zh: 莎拉：我也是。有一天我要去月球参观。

en: Wu Binbin: The Americans took about five days to get there in 1969.
zh: 吴彬彬：美国人在1969年花了大约五天时间去那里。

en: Sarah: How do you know that?
zh: 莎拉：你怎么知道的？

en: Wu Binbin: Easy, I looked it up on the Internet.
zh: 吴彬彬：很简单，我在网上查到了。

en: Grandpa: Ah! There were no computers or Internet in my time.
zh: 爷爷：啊！我那时候没有电脑和互联网。

en: What was Grandpa’s school like?
zh: 爷爷的学校是什么样的？

en: What was your school like five years ago? What is it like now? Draw and talk.
zh: 你五年前的学校是什么样的？现在是什么样的？画出来说一说。

en: Chen Jie: John, come and look at Mike’s old photos!
zh: 陈洁：约翰，过来看看迈克的旧照片！

en: John: That’s funny, Mike! You’re wearing a pink T-shirt.
zh: 约翰：真滑稽，迈克！你穿着一件粉色的T恤。

en: Mike: Yes, but I don’t like pink now.
zh: 迈克：是的，但是我现在不喜欢粉色了。

en: Chen Jie: We are all different now!
zh: 陈洁：我们现在都不同了！

en: Mike: Right. Before, I was quiet. Now, I’m very active in class.
zh: 迈克：对。以前我比较安静，现在我上课很活跃。

en: John: Well, I was short, so I couldn’t ride my bike well. Now, I go cycling every day. I like it very much.
zh: 约翰：我以前比较矮，所以骑自行车不好。现在我每天骑自行车，我非常喜欢。

en: Chen Jie: That’s good exercise.
zh: 陈洁：这是一种很好的锻炼。

en: How did Mike change?
zh: 迈克是怎么变化的？

en: Talk about your friends or family members. How did they change?
zh: 谈谈你的朋友或家人。他们是怎么变化的？

en: wasn’t tall/… didn’t like maths/… had long/… hair didn’t like cats/… didn’t wear glasses/… didn’t like eggs/…
zh: 他/她以前不高的/不喜欢数学的/有一头长头发的/不喜欢猫的/不戴眼镜的/不喜欢鸡蛋的…

en: Tell your partner.
zh: 告诉你的伙伴。

en: 1. What animal can run very fast?
zh: 1. 哪种动物跑得很快？

en: 2. What makes you feel worried?
zh: 2. 让你感到担心的是什么？

en: What a dream!
zh: 多么棒的一场梦！

en: Wu Binbin had a race with his father and Max. There were many people there. His father ran very fast, but Wu Binbin could not.
zh: 吴彬彬和他的爸爸和麦克斯赛跑了。有很多人在那里。他的爸爸跑得很快，但是吴彬彬跑不过。

en: There was nothing he could do. He was so worried. "I could run fast at school," he thought. "Why am I so slow now?"
zh: 他什么也做不了。他非常担心。他想说：“我上学的时候跑得很快，为什么我现在这么慢呢？”

en: Then Robin said, "Drink this!" and gave Wu Binbin some water. Wu Binbin drank it and suddenly he felt good. He could run fast again.
zh: 这时罗宾说：“喝这个！”并给吴彬彬一些水。吴彬彬喝了下去，突然他感觉好多了。他又能跑得很快了。

en: There was a second race. There were many animals in that race.
zh: 又有一场比赛。比赛中有许多动物。

en: Wu Binbin ran like a cheetah. He could win the race.
zh: 吴彬彬像猎豹一样跑。他能赢得比赛。

en: But suddenly he tripped and fell.
zh: 但是他突然绊倒了，摔下来了。

en: Then he woke up.
zh: 然后他醒了。

en: He was in bed.
zh: 他在床上。

en: It was all a dream!
zh: 这都是一个梦！

en: Wu Binbin is telling his mother about the dream.
zh: 吴滨滨在告诉他的妈妈关于梦的事情。

en: Wu Binbin: Mum, I had an interesting dream last night.
zh: 吴滨滨：妈妈，我昨晚做了一个有趣的梦。

en: Mum: What did you dream about?
zh: 妈妈：你梦到了什么？

en: Wu Binbin: I had a race with Dad and Max, but I lost.
zh: 吴滨滨：我和爸爸和马克赛跑，但是我输了。

en: Mum: What happened then?
zh: 妈妈：然后呢？

en: Wu Binbin: Robin gave me some water. I drank it and then could run very fast.
zh: 吴滨滨：罗宾给我递了水。我喝了它，然后才能跑得很快。

en: Suddenly I tripped and fell. Then I woke up.
zh: 突然我绊倒了，摔下来了。然后我醒了。

en: Mum: What a dream!
zh: 妈妈：多奇怪的梦啊！

en: Did you have an interesting dream? Tell your dream to your partner. Then write several sentences about it.
zh: 你做了一个有趣的梦吗？把你的梦告诉你的伙伴。然后写几句话来描述它。

en: I had a dream last night. In my dream, I …
zh: 我昨晚做了一个梦。在我的梦里，我……

en: What a dream!
zh: 多奇怪的梦啊！

en: Cross out the words you didn’t hear.
zh: 圈出你没有听到的单词。

en: gym, dining hall, grass, cycling, ice-skating, badminton
zh: 体育馆、餐厅、草地、自行车、滑冰、羽毛球

en: Let’s wrap it up
zh: 让我们总结一下

en: Changes are all around us. Talk about the changes below.
zh: 变化无处不在。谈谈下面这些变化。

en: In summer, the tree There was a building before.
zh: 夏天，树木这里曾经有一栋建筑物。

en: Now …
zh: 现在……

en: Chen Jie was short. It was an egg. Now she is 1.5 metres tall.
zh: 陈洁小时候很矮。她曾经是个鸡蛋。现在她长高了1.5米。

en: The cat was on the chair. Now …
zh: 猫坐在椅子上。现在……

en: C Story time
zh: 故事时间

en: Cavemen often ate raw meat. They didn’t cook their food.
zh: 原始人经常吃生肉。他们不给食物做饭。

en: Now there are many things to help you cook.
zh: 现在有很多东西可以帮助你做饭。

en: In 2050, there will be house robots.
zh: 在2050年，会有家用机器人。

en: They will cook, clean, and wash the dishes.
zh: 它们会做饭、打扫卫生和洗碗。

en: Zip: Oh, cavemen didn’t cook their meat? Zoom: It’s OK. They didn’t do the dishes either!
zh: 齐普：哦，原始人没煮肉吗？ 卓姆：没关系。他们也不洗碗。

en: There were many trees, and there were many clean rivers.
zh: 这里有很多树，还有很多干净的河流。

en: The forests will be healthy and green again.
zh: 森林会变得健康和绿色再次。

en: Zip: Look! How beautiful the world was! Oh! What will the birds do? Zoom: Don’t worry. People will help them.
zh: 齐普：快看！世界原来多美丽啊！哦！鸟儿会做什么？ 卓姆：不用担心。人们会帮助他们。

en: Before humans lived on the earth, whales already lived in the sea.
zh: 在人类居住在地球之前，鲸鱼已经在海洋里生活。

en: Zip: Heal the world!
zh: 齐普：拯救世界！

en: Zoom: Make it a better place!
zh: 朱姆：让它变得更好！

en: Mike visited a farm. What can you see on the farm?
zh: 迈克参观了农场。你能在农场里看到什么？

en: a pear
zh: 一个梨

en: a jacket
zh: 一件夹克

en: an egg
zh: 一个鸡蛋

en: an orange
zh: 一个橙子

en: Fruit apple egg jacket horse tomato orange cake shoes
zh: 水果 苹果 鸡蛋 夹克 马 番茄 橙子 蛋糕 鞋

en: Can you name the groups of words?
zh: 你能把这些词分组吗？

en: Can you think of one more word group? Can you add more words to the groups?
zh: 你能想出另一个词组吗？你能把更多的词加入这些组里吗？

en: Mike’s happy days
zh: 迈克的快乐时光

en: Day 2 Farmers’ market
zh: 第二天的农贸市场

en: Mrs Booth and Bill want to go shopping. Help them finish their mind map.
zh: 布斯夫人和比尔想去购物。 帮助他们完成他们的思维导图。

en: Bill                     short         tall
zh: 比尔 短 高

en: Mrs Booth thin young long hair a red bag white shoes
zh: 布斯夫人 瘦 年轻 长头发 一只红色的包 一双白色的鞋

en: Bill is my new friend. He’s short and heavy.
zh: 比尔是我的新朋友。 他很矮很重。

en: Day 3 Life on the farm
zh: 农场生活

en: These are things people often do on the farm.
zh: 这是人们在农场里经常做的事情。

en: Bill liked candy.
zh: 比尔喜欢糖果。

en: Bill is taller than before.
zh: 比尔以前比现在高。

en: Bill will wear a red hat to work.
zh: 比尔将戴一顶红帽子去工作。

en: Bill likes to read storybooks.
zh: 比尔喜欢阅读故事书。

en: Bill was smaller before.
zh: 比尔以前更小。

en: Bill will be thinner than he is now.
zh: 比尔将比现在更瘦。

en: Design your own poster.
zh: 设计你自己的海报。

en: Day 7 Mike’s surprise
zh: 第七天 迈克的惊喜

en: Mike’s school sent him an invitation.
zh: 迈克学校给他发了一份邀请函。

en: Dear Friends, It is time to leave our school. We are all going to middle school soon, so we will say goodbye to each other. We are going to have a farewell party. You can bring your friends.
zh: 亲爱的朋友们，是时候离开我们的学校了。 我们很快就要进入中学了，所以我们将告别彼此。 我们将举行告别派对。 你可以带上你的朋友们。

en: Place: Our music room Time: Friday 3 p.m.
zh: 地点：我们的音乐室 时间：星期五下午3点

en: Activities: We will draw pictures and sing songs. We are going to give prizes for the best pictures. We are going to have cake, candy and juice, too. Yum!
zh: 活动：我们将会画画和唱歌。 我们将为最好的画作颁奖。 我们还将吃蛋糕、糖果和果汁。 好吃！

en: We will also give many prizes to our good students. For example, who helped others the most? Who studied hard? Who wrote the best story?
zh: 我们还将奖励优秀的同学。 例如，谁帮助了别人最多？ 谁努力学习了？ 谁写了最好的故事？

en: We will listen to music, play games and dance. It will be great fun. See you at the party!
zh: 我们会听音乐、玩游戏和跳舞。 这将会很有趣。 我们在派对上见！

en: What are they going to do at the party?
zh: 他们将在派对上做什么？

en: Who is go
zh: 谁去

en: Going to the party?
zh: 去参加派对吗？

en: Are you going to go to the party?
zh: 你要去参加派对吗？

en: What will you do at the party?
zh: 你派对上会做什么？

en: I am going to be on ,
zh: 我要去参加 ,

en: I will
zh: 我会

en: What can you see in the picture?
zh: 你能在图画里看到什么？

en: I have some good news and some bad news.
zh: 我有一些好消息和一些坏消息。

en: Where are you going?
zh: 你要去哪里？

en: Are you going to a new school?
zh: 你要去新的学校吗？

en: I’m going to a new middle school.
zh: 我要去新的中学。

en: I’ll be in Grade 7.
zh: 我将上七年级。

en: Take care.
zh: 保重。
